name: Phasmophobia
description: Phasmophobia is a 4 player online co-op psychological horror. Paranormal activity is on the rise and it’s up to you and your team to use all the ghost-hunting equipment at your disposal in order to gather as much evidence as you can.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64Bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 / AMD Radeon R9 390
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 21 GB available space
  • VR Support: OpenXR
  • Additional Notes: Minimum Specs are for VR, lower specs may work for Non-VR.
comment1: Phas, it breaks my heart to leave a negative review. I've played your game for over 1770 hours. I've watched you push repetitive event content and ignore bugs for years. I've heard your promises of roadmap updates heard your promises of bug fixes, seen your lack of transparency (one holiday event was never even announced on steam till it was halfway over) and heard the stories of toxicity. When the player customization update got pushed and I saw just how big of a step backward it was, I told myself that surely this couldn't have been what we had been waiting for three years for you to deliver. The collab with Alan Wake? is a insult to Alan Wake. I hope that you take some time to seriously look at your game and your community and see how broken it is, how unhappy we are. But, if I'm being honest, I just don't think you will. The empty promises have eroded my trust to the point where I have none left. Hopefully you wake up before more people like me have moved on. I wanted SO much for you to succeed. I still do. Please be better. Do better. Fix the bugs. Focus on finishing your game before you collaborate with other people. Be more transparent. actually LISTEN to the feedback and community full of people who despite everything still want you to succeed.
comment2:
It's not a lake, it's an ocean
It's not a loop, it's a spiral
It's not a Demon, it's a Mimic
comment3:
I don't even know where to begin with the latest update, and this one had a massive list of fixes. The 'customisation' is worse than a PS2 game. The animations are unnatural, jarring and broken. Equipment is sometimes half off the screen. The journal isn't readable now because it's zoomed out?

And during a game it's even harder since people clipping through it flashes the text.

I've been critical of the design direction (why remake old maps people like???) but this time it's not just that, the game is not currently unplayable.

When will you start listening to the whole community instead of circle-jerking inside discord. Stop making deals for merch and start hiring game developers who know how to make games. The response as well "I didn't make it I just signed off on it" shows a level of arrogance and contempt.

I cannot believe you signed off on this update. Years and years of Dev and THIS is what you think is an acceptable release?
